description_long: This is a two-story apartment building with a symmetrical facade, featuring a red-tiled gable roof and cream-colored exterior walls. The front side has two prominent entryways, each with a small covered porch, and a driveway leading to a road with a parked car. The building is set on a rectangular plot with green grass on either side and a paved sidewalk in front. The rear of the building is simpler, with large sliding glass doors or windows opening onto a patio area. The windows are evenly spaced and rectangular, contributing to a balanced and modern residential appearance.
description: A two-story cream apartment building with a red-tiled roof, symmetrical entryways, and a driveway facing a road. The rear features large glass doors and a patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main entrances, covered porches, a driveway, and a car parked by the road.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, the depth of the building, and the grassy side yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large sliding glass doors or windows and a patio area, with no visible entrances.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's length, the driveway, and the car from a different angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in pairs on both floors, evenly spaced and aligned vertically and horizontally across the facade.
